text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It's morning, and right before classes<n>start...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... My head feels as if it weighs a<n>ton, and I
cannot speak with my usual<n>grandeur.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Tch... Now it begins to throb...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I cannot deliver my heavenly<n>wake up call to
those living on the<n>earth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, everyone will become<n>stricken with
anxiety. That must be<n>avoided at any cost!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She yells out in pain from the<n>headache, her cries
echoing down the<n>halls.
